design_philosophy: Authoritative, sleek, and high-contrast. Fusing the clinical precision of Swiss design with moody, cinematic luxury. The tension lies in the sterile dark background (#0b0b0b) clashing with electric blue (#007bff) and organic warm beige (#f5f5dc) accents.

hero_mockup.description: Creative agency workspace monitor, moody lighting, modern mockup canvas.

portfolio_ironfit.description: IronFit Gym - High-contrast workout imagery for fitness portfolio item.

portfolio_urbanbites.description: Urban Bites - Elegant restaurant dining setup.

about_workspace.description: Modern agency workspace showing the team in action.

header.styling: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0b0b0b]/70 border-b border-white/10 h-20 flex items-center

hero.layout: min-h-screen relative flex items-center pt-20 overflow-hidden
hero.background: Three.js ShaderAnimation canvas spanning full absolute background
hero.content: Headline ('Steering your business toward online success'), secondary beige accent text. 2 Buttons. Mockup image tilted in 3D perspective using framer-motion.

services.styling: Cards use the 'flat' surface style. Hover: -translate-y-1, border glows primary blue. Icons use Phosphor Icons (duotone, primary blue).

pricing.styling: Generous p-10 padding. Highlighted card uses primary blue border. The 'Tracing Beam' concept on hover. Beige text for price values to warm up the dark aesthetic.

portfolio.layout: Asymmetric Grid: MODE A 'Tetris Grid'. Mix of col-span-8 and col-span-4.
portfolio.styling: Large image cards with dark gradient overlays. Text appears on hover. Use image urls from media section.

testimonials.styling: Cards with glassmorphism surface. Avatar on left, quote in beige text, name in white.

about_process.layout: Two column grid (text left, image right). Timeline visualization for process.
about_process.styling: Use about_workspace image. Process steps connected by a subtle primary blue dashed line.

contact_faq.layout: Grid split: Contact Form (Left 7 cols), FAQ Accordion (Right 5 cols)
contact_faq.styling: Form inputs use bg-transparent border-white/20 focus:border-[#007bff]. FAQ uses Shadcn Accordion, minimalist borders.

cta.layout: Full width, heavy padding py-32 text-center
cta.content: Ready to steer your business in the right direction?
cta.styling: Radial gradient background (blue glow in center fading to #0b0b0b).

technical_requirements.animations: framer-motion for scroll-triggered staggers, Three.js (@react-three/fiber & @react-three/drei) for Hero Shader. Lenis for smooth scrolling.
technical_requirements.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button').
technical_requirements.components: shadcn/ui for Form, Accordion, Carousel, Buttons, Inputs. Custom HTML/Tailwind for bento grids.
